title: Railway -> Render Transition Plan & Artifact Explorer Redesign
summary: Migration plan to move the Express backend from Railway to Render and redesign the portal-v2 artifact explorer with a styled Excel renderer and in-memory LRU search.
scope: In-memory LRU artifact cache and search index
notes: Hybrid document combining migration spec (Render service config, env vars, API route table, phased cutover) with PRD-style scope (artifact explorer v1 scope, deferred v2 features, success criteria). Classified SPEC because technical contracts dominate: explicit route table in section 7.7, service configuration matrix in section 4, env var inventory, rollback table with recovery times, and concrete file-level surface in section 7.8. Status header 'Approved plan, pre-implementation' is decision-flavored but the document lacks ADR structure (no Context/Decision/Consequences sections, no numbered ADR filename); a pre-migration ADR is explicitly listed as a future deliverable in Phase 0 step 3, confirming this doc is not itself the ADR. PRD signals (goals, success criteria, deferred scope) are present but subordinate to the technical spec content.
